note: Two entry doors. Today neither exists as designed: landing.tsx is a 17-line redirect to /auth, and the invite resolver (PR #440 app/invite/[code].tsx) is a spinner that hands off into auth signup. The de-facto current entry experience for everyone is the auth.tsx multi-step funnel. Inventory below = that current funnel (the baseline we restructure) + the net-new constructs the two doors imply.

items.label: Landing = blank 'Redirecting...' then router.replace('/auth')
items.notes: Screen 2 today: no browse-first landing exists; cold visitors get dumped straight into auth.

not_visible_but_implied: Universal-link resolution: chinmayajanata.org/i/CODE opens app or web fallback (#104 plumbing)
Deep-link resume: a pending action (RSVP an event) survives the auth detour and completes after
Auto-logged-in users hitting an invite link should NOT see signup
